# CWKeychainDomain.user

**Case**

The user keychain domain.

## Declaration

```swift
case user
```

## Discussion

If iCloud Keychain is enabled, the iCloud keychain is the user keychain.

## Constants

- **CWKeychainDomain.none**: No keychain domain specified.
- **CWKeychainDomain.system**: The system keychain domain.
title: CWKeychainDomain.user
